title: Update libjpeg-turbo to 3.0.0
body:
**Description of Change**

This PR updates the `libjpeg-turbo` external dependency to the latest v3.0.0

**SkiaSharp Issue**

Related to https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/issues/2578

**API Changes**

None.

**Behavioral Changes**

None.

**Required SkiaSharp PR**

Requires https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2583

**PR Checklist**

- [x] Rebased on top of `skiasharp` at time of PR
- [x] Changes adhere to coding standard
- [x] Updated documentation
